---
title: 'Brief Industry Paper: The Matter of Time — A General and Efficient System
  for Precise Sensor Synchronization in Robotic Computing'
author:
- Shaoshan Liu
- Bo Yu
- Yahui Liu
- Kunai Zhang
- Yisong Qiao
- Thomas Yuang Li
- Jie Tang
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2103.16045.pdf
journ: RTAS
year: 2021
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 47
---
